# Eden & Beyond

> Eden & Beyond is an independent creative studio and design brand founded by Maija. Two activities: (1) a creative studio designing hospitality, residential and commercial projects (hotels, restaurants, bars, villas) with creative direction; and (2) a design collection of bespoke furniture, lighting, objects and limited editions available on their own. Based in Thailand, working internationally.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://edenandbeyond.studio/): Studio & design brand overview
- [Studio](https://edenandbeyond.studio/studio.html): The studio, founder Maija & creative services
- [Collection](https://edenandbeyond.studio/collection.html): Bespoke furniture, lighting, objects & limited editions
- [Projects](https://edenandbeyond.studio/projects.html): Selected work, including Dar Mansour
- [Journal](https://edenandbeyond.studio/journal.html): Editorial on design & hospitality
- [Contact](https://edenandbeyond.studio/contact.html): Start a project or enquire about a piece

## Disciplines
- [Hospitality Design](https://edenandbeyond.studio/hospitality-design.html)
- [Restaurant Design](https://edenandbeyond.studio/restaurant-design.html)
- [Residential Design](https://edenandbeyond.studio/residential-design.html)
- [Furniture & Object Design](https://edenandbeyond.studio/furniture-object-design.html)
- [Creative Direction](https://edenandbeyond.studio/creative-direction.html)
